dct_title_s: New York City Historical Building Footprints, 2026
dct_description_sm: New York City Historical Building Footprints, 2026 is a polygon theme representing the perimeter extent of buildings that have been demolished or significantly altered in New York City since 2004. Additional attribute information maintained for each feature includes: Building Identification Number (BIN); Borough, Block, and Lot information; ground elevation at building base; roof height above ground elevation; construction year; demolition year; and feature type. Columbia Libraries staff downloaded this dataset from the NYCMap Hub at https://nycmaps-nyc.hub.arcgis.com/datasets/nyc::building-historic/about reprojected it to state plane coordinates and reformatted to the geopackage format in March of 2026. Additional information about the data may be found at https://github.com/CityOfNewYork/nyc-geo-metadata/blob/main/Metadata/Metadata_BuildingHistoric.md
dct_creator_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Information Technology and Telecommunications.
dct_publisher_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Information Technology and Telecommunications.
dct_rightsHolder_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Information Technology and Telecommunications.
